Translation.Text:
GeoMedi_CAD/CAM Attachment Library
DISCLAIMER OF WARRANTY THIS DATA IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND WITHOUT WARRANTIES AS TO PERFORMANCE, ACCURACY, OR MERCHANTABILITY. THE SELLER'S SALESPERSONS MAY HAVE MADE STATEMENTS ABOUT THIS DATA. ANY SUCH STATEMENTS DO NOT CONSTITUTE WARRANTIES AND SHALL NOT BE RELIED ON BY USER IN DECIDING WHETHER TO USE THIS DATA. THIS DATA IS PROVIDED WITHOUT ANY EXPRESSED OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES WHATSOEVER. BECAUSE OF THE DIVERSITY OF CONDITIONS AND HARDWARE UNDER WHICH THIS DATA MAY BE USED, NO WARRANTY OF FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE IS OFFERED. THE USER IS ADVISED TO TEST THE DATA THOROUGHLY BEFORE RELYING ON IT. THE USER MUST ASSUME THE ENTIRE RISK OF USING THIS DATA AND ACCEPTS IT "WITH ALL ITS FAULTS". THE USER MUST ASSUME THE ENTIRE RISK OF USING THE PROGRAM.
Only use this locator attachment data with GeoMedi. custom abutment library for EXOCAD. Please contact us at 02 588 2871 or visit us at http://www.geomedi.co.kr for installation and Instruction for Use.
Warning: These custom-angled locators are designed to be milled by GeoMedi Inc. GeoMedi Inc. does not assume any liability for the quality and safety of the locator abutments that are not manufactured by GeoMedi Inc.
GeoMedi is a registered Trademark.
